_comment: FULL asset bank for Lantern Guild — canonical, verified against on-disk .tres registries (assets/data/classes, assets/data/biomes, assets/data/enemies) + the AudioRouter cue catalog + ADR-0022. Counts: 14 SFX, 10 music, 6 biome backgrounds, 7 class portraits, 34 enemy sprites, 7 class in-dungeon sprites (4-frame idle strips, 768x432 @ 16:9), 3 VFX particles. The 4 pilot assets (forest_reach, warrior, abyss_eel, gold_sparkle) + ui_tap + guild_hall_bed are listed here for completeness but already exist on disk; ALWAYS run this manifest with --skip-existing so approved pilot assets are NOT regenerated (Gemini/ElevenLabs are non-deterministic). The 10 music beds live in audio.music and are HELD until the user confirms guild_hall_bed.ogg quality (generate with --only music --skip-existing). NOT in this manifest: UI icons — DESIGN.md §Iconography locks them to a 1px-stroke flat-fill pixel style that Gemini renders poorly; icons are a separate hand-authoring decision. WIRING/GITIGNORE NOTES: assets/art/classes/ + assets/art/enemies/ are gitignored as demo-IP placeholders (un-ignore before committing real art); biome backgrounds are not yet loaded by code (BiomeBackground is procedural ColorRects — needs a Sprite2D/TextureRect swap); VFX path (assets/vfx/particles) is not yet loaded (dungeon_run_view.gd VFX_BURST_TEXTURE_PATH points at the demo vfx_aura). Generation works regardless; wiring is a follow-up code task with no spend.

sfx.prompt: A soft, warm, cozy UI confirm tap — a single gentle wooden-and-felt click with a faint lantern-warm chime tail. Clean, short, satisfying, low-key. No harsh transient, no reverb wash.
A soft paper-unfolding texture as a parchment panel slides into view — gentle, dry, warm, no harsh transient, no reverb.
A quiet paper-folding-away rustle as a parchment panel dismisses — the mirror of the open sound, settling and unhurried, warm and dry.
A short clean kill-confirm ping with a warm woody body — bright but not aggressive, satisfying and cozy. No metallic clang.
A heavier, more resonant kill chime with a longer warm tail — a satisfying low thud-bloom marking a boss falling, weighty but still cozy, not violent.
A quiet muffled padded knock signalling a hero took a hit — soft, low, non-alarming, more a gentle bump than a thud. No sharp impact.
A brief encouraging two-note rising chime — warm and reassuring, signalling a favourable class-vs-biome matchup. Bright, hopeful, gentle.
A warm coin-purse shuffle — soft leather-and-coin texture, cozy and rounded, never metallic or slot-machine bright. A satisfying little gold gain.
A single warm bell-like tone with a gentle decaying tail celebrating a hero level-up — clear, hopeful, settled, cozy.

A short ceremonial multi-note phrase on warm acoustic instruments marking a floor clear — celebratory and cozy with a clear settled ending that does not escalate. Fingerpicked guitar and soft dulcimer.
A richer, fuller warm fanfare flourish reserved for unlocking a new hero class — the most triumphant moment, yet still cozy and acoustic, with a satisfied resolved ending.
A warm, slightly bittersweet sting for retiring a hero to the Hall of Honor — a respectful sending-off swell with a gentle gold shimmer, dignified and tender, not a victory blast.
A soft 'you-found-something' discovery chime when a class synergy lights up in the formation editor — warm, curious, low-key, NOT a fanfare.
A single warm confirming sting at run start when an active synergy is dispatched — same cozy register as the detection chime but a fuller 'locked in' beat.

music.prompt: A warm, cozy fantasy guild-hall ambient music bed. Gentle fingerpicked acoustic guitar and soft hammered dulcimer over a low hearth-fire warmth, relaxed and unhurried, seamlessly loopable, no percussion build, no vocals. Evokes a lantern-lit medieval hall at dusk where adventurers rest between dungeon runs.

A quiet woodland-night ambient music bed for a cozy forest dungeon — soft flute and harp pads, distant water and gently rustling leaves, warm and unhurried, no percussion, no vocals, seamlessly loopable.

A cold, hushed ambient music bed for a frozen bog — sparse glassy bell tones and a low icy drone with a faint wind whisper, calm and still, gently warm at its core, no percussion, no vocals, seamlessly loopable.
A submerged stone-temple ambient music bed — slow dripping water, faint wind through arches, a deep soft drone, reverberant and reverent yet cozy, no percussion, no vocals, seamlessly loopable.
A high windswept-mountain ambient music bed — airy choral-pad whispers and a distant low flute over open-air wind, lonely but warm, no percussion, no vocals, seamlessly loopable.

A warm smouldering ambient music bed for an ember basin — a low ember-crackle drone with sparse warm marimba tones, glowing and slow, never threatening, no percussion build, no vocals, seamlessly loopable.
A deep descending-stairwell ambient music bed — hollow resonant low drones and faraway dripping echoes, mysterious and cavernous yet cozy, no percussion, no vocals, seamlessly loopable.

A subtly heightened ambient music bed for boss floors — the cozy register with a touch more low-end weight and a slow tension pad, anticipatory but never combat-driven, no percussion build, no vocals, seamlessly loopable.

A gently triumphant ambient music bed for the victory result screen — warm major-key acoustic guitar and dulcimer with a contented resolved feel, a satisfied exhale after a run, no percussion, no vocals, seamlessly loopable.

A short ~3-second one-shot warmth-continuation stinger that plays under the floor-clear moment — a brief rising warm acoustic phrase with a ~1.5s body and a ~1.5s settling tail, cozy and celebratory, not looping.

backgrounds.prompt: Dungeon-biome backdrop diorama: 'Forest Reach' — an overgrown ancient woodland dungeon approach. Mossy stone arches, dappled green canopy light, drifting spores, a worn path leading into shadow. Moss Sage greens and Guild Amber warmth, Slate Ink shadow depth. Horizontal parallax-friendly composition, soft depth-of-field, no characters.

Dungeon-biome backdrop diorama: 'Sunken Ruins' — a drowned coral-choked ancient city approach. Moss-overgrown statues and silt-buried slate tablets, Lantern Gold light pools from old sconces, cool desaturated grey-blue water reflections, drifting motes. Dusk Purple #5B4A72 and weathered ochre deepening to blue-grey, Slate Ink shadow. Horizontal parallax-friendly composition, soft depth-of-field, no characters.

Dungeon-biome backdrop diorama: 'Ember Wastes' — an ancient burn-scar basin approach. Fused-glass ridges and ash-swallowed trading-post ruins, glowing lava and bioluminescent veins, drifting embers. Ember Rust #A84C2F and deep charcoal with bright Lantern Gold #F2B83B glowing veins, warm high contrast. Horizontal parallax-friendly composition, soft depth-of-field, no characters.

Dungeon-biome backdrop diorama: 'Frostmire' — a three-centuries-frozen bog approach. Reeds frozen mid-sway, cairns of frozen peat marking lost pilgrims, pale low light, faint drifting snow. Bone-white and pale icy blues, desaturated and cozy, Slate Ink shadow with faint Lantern Gold lantern warmth. Horizontal parallax-friendly composition, soft depth-of-field, no characters.

Dungeon-biome backdrop diorama: 'The Hollow Stair' — a bottomless descending vault approach beneath the wastes. Oil-less lamps burning on every stone landing, iron judgment-chairs holding centuries-old verdicts, deep downward perspective. Blue-grey vault stone and Slate Ink with warm Lantern Gold #F2B83B lamp glow. Horizontal parallax-friendly composition, soft depth-of-field, no characters.

Dungeon-biome backdrop diorama: 'Whispering Crags' — a high wind-carved cliff path far above the forest lanterns. Wind-carved stone sentinels and lonely cairns, storm light, distant valleys far below. Storm-grey Slate Ink #2C2838 stone with Dusk Purple shadow and faint Lantern Gold lantern warmth. Horizontal parallax-friendly composition, soft depth-of-field, no characters.

Guild-hall interior backdrop diorama: 'The Lantern Guild Hall' — a cozy warm tavern-like guild interior seen as an intimate miniature you could pick up. A glowing stone hearth, hanging brass lanterns pooling soft amber light, a worn wooden quest board with pinned parchment notices, heavy oak tables and benches, shelves of ledgers and bottles, a calm uncluttered centre. Guild Amber #C8872A and Lantern Gold #F2B83B warmth over warm wood browns, Parchment Cream #EDE0C4 highlights, Slate Ink #2C2838 shadow depth. Horizontal parallax-friendly composition, soft tilt-shift depth-of-field, evening warmth, no characters.

portraits.prompt: Character roster portrait, bust framing, facing slightly off-camera: a stalwart cozy-fantasy Warrior hero — weathered iron pauldrons, a warm scarf, a kind tired face lit by lantern glow. Guild Amber and Slate Ink with Lantern Gold rim light.

Character roster portrait, bust framing, facing slightly off-camera: a thoughtful cozy-fantasy Mage hero — a tall arcane focus-staff rising past one shoulder, a bell-flared robe, a curious lantern-lit face. Dusk Purple arcana robes with Lantern Gold spell-glow and Slate Ink shadow.

Character roster portrait, bust framing, slightly turned: a lean cozy-fantasy Rogue hero — a hood shadowing a sharp watchful face, a reverse-grip dagger glinting near one shoulder, light leathers. Muted Slate Ink and Moss Sage leathers with a warm lantern rim light.

Character roster portrait, bust framing, facing gently forward: a kind cozy-fantasy Cleric healer — a small luminous lantern or censer raised off to one side, soft robes, a serene warm-lit face. Warm whites and Guild Amber, the warmest portrait, with a gentle Lantern Gold glow.

Character roster portrait, bust framing, slightly turned: a steady cozy-fantasy Archer hero — a quiver over one shoulder, a bow held ready, a calm focused face under a practical hood. Moss Sage and leather browns, naturalistic, with a warm lantern rim light.

Character roster portrait, bust framing, facing slightly off-camera: a fierce cozy-fantasy Berserker hero — broad bare shoulders with rough fur and iron, a wild determined face, braided hair. Ember Rust rage-accents over Slate Ink with a hot Lantern Gold rim light.

Character roster portrait, bust framing, upright and composed: a dependable cozy-fantasy Paladin defender — a tabard over polished plate, a calm dutiful face, the guild's colors. Deep Parchment Cream and Guild Amber with Lantern Gold rim light and Slate Ink shadow.

enemy_sprites.prompt: 'Abyss Eel' — a sleek serpentine eel-body in a long low silhouette, pale Parchment Cream flesh over Dusk Purple and Slate Ink depths, a single faint Lantern Gold eye-glow, patient and predatory. Side-view, full body centred, consistent readable silhouette.

'Ancient Rootking' (boss) — a colossal hunched figure of fused roots and old keep-stone, a towering gnarled-trunk silhouette in Moss Sage and Ember Rust bark, lantern-warm sap glowing in its seams, ancient and immovable. Side-view, full body centred, imposing readable silhouette.

'Ash Djinn' — a dense coiling smoke-djinn with a solid muscular upper body tapering into a curled smoke-tail and no legs, its whole form one opaque continuous mass of Slate Ink ash banded with Ember Rust and glowing Lantern Gold embers, slow-burning and serene. A single solid fully-painted body with one clear continuous silhouette, NOT scattered particles, NOT dissipating wisps or stray dots. Side-view, full body centred, consistent readable silhouette.

'Cinder Jackal' — a lean four-legged jackal in a low running stance, smoke-grey Slate Ink coat shot through with Ember Rust glowing cracks, hot Lantern Gold eyes, fast and pack-hungry. Side-view, full body centred, consistent readable silhouette.

'Coral Warden' — a broad stone-golem hulk overgrown with branching coral, a blocky armored silhouette in Slate Ink stone and muted Guild Amber coral, barnacle-crusted and immovably patient. Side-view, full body centred, consistent readable silhouette.

'Cradle Judge' — a robed seated figure fused to a tall iron chair, a still vertical silhouette in Dusk Purple robes and Slate Ink iron, faceless under a hood with a faint Lantern Gold glint, eternally deliberating. Side-view, full body centred, consistent readable silhouette.

'Crag Wraith' — a hooded stone-phantom rising from a Slate Ink crag, a solid upright cloaked figure draped in Parchment Cream and Dusk Purple cloth with a ragged hem and hollow Lantern Gold eyes. A single solid opaque fully-painted body with one clear continuous silhouette, NOT vapor, NOT wind-streamed or scattered particles. Side-view, full body centred, consistent readable silhouette.

'Deep Thrall' — a bloated drowned humanoid in waterlogged rags, a heavy slumped silhouette in Dusk Purple and Moss Sage rot with Slate Ink shadows, a dim Lantern Gold glow where its eyes should be. Side-view, full body centred, consistent readable silhouette.

'Echo Serpent' (boss) — a vast coiled serpent looped through cliff-stone, a sweeping spiral silhouette in Slate Ink scales edged with Dusk Purple, resonant Lantern Gold rings pulsing along its length. Side-view, full body centred, imposing readable silhouette.

'Elder Boar' — a massive low-slung boar with oversized curved tusks, a bulky four-legged silhouette in Ember Rust and Moss Sage bristled hide with a Slate Ink underbelly, small bright Lantern Gold eyes. Side-view, full body centred, consistent readable silhouette.

'Frost Revenant' — a gaunt frost-rimed undead lurching forward, a ragged upright silhouette in Parchment Cream frost and Dusk Purple flesh over Slate Ink, a faint cold Lantern Gold eye-glow. Side-view, full body centred, consistent readable silhouette.

'Glasswind Walker' — a slow heavy humanoid plated head-to-toe in solid fused desert glass, a complete angular armored body in Dusk Purple and Slate Ink catching warm Lantern Gold glints, patient and hard. A single solid opaque fully-painted figure with one clear continuous silhouette, NOT shattered fragments, NOT scattered or floating shards. Side-view, full body centred, consistent readable silhouette.

'Glowmoth' — a large soft-bodied moth with broad wings, a gentle rounded silhouette in Moss Sage and Parchment Cream dusted wings, a warm Lantern Gold glow pulsing from its body, drawn to firelight. Side-view, full body centred, consistent readable silhouette.

'Hollow Brute' — a lumbering driftwood golem of lashed branches, a crooked top-heavy silhouette in weathered Guild Amber and Moss Sage wood with Slate Ink hollows and an embered Ember Rust glow, lurching toward light. Side-view, full body centred, consistent readable silhouette.

'Icebound Pilgrim' — a frozen hooded pilgrim mid-stride, a solid forward-leaning robed figure in a Dusk Purple cloak glazed with Parchment Cream ice over Slate Ink, a faint Lantern Gold flicker within the hood. A single solid opaque fully-painted body with one clear continuous silhouette, the ice a hard glaze on the cloth — NOT a white haze, NOT scattered or dissolving particles. Side-view, full body centred, consistent readable silhouette.

'Iron Silent' — an empty suit of heavy armor walking on its own, a solid knightly silhouette in Slate Ink iron and tarnished Guild Amber trim, a hollow Dusk Purple void inside, dim Lantern Gold seams. Side-view, full body centred, consistent readable silhouette.

'Lamplit Chorister' — a slender robed singer carrying a small dim lamp, a tall narrow silhouette in Dusk Purple robes and Slate Ink, the held lamp a soft Lantern Gold ember, mouth open in silent song. Side-view, full body centred, consistent readable silhouette.

'Marrow Witch' — a hunched gaunt sorceress wrapped in heavy layered Dusk Purple rags, a solid crooked figure with Parchment Cream bone-pale skin over Moss Sage, cold Lantern Gold light cupped in her hands. A single solid opaque fully-painted body with one clear continuous silhouette, NOT scattered particles, NOT dissolving mist or stipple dots. Side-view, full body centred, consistent readable silhouette.

'Mire Colossus' — a towering swamp-risen giant of mud, moss and bone, a heavy hulking silhouette in Moss Sage and Slate Ink muck dripping Dusk Purple, a faint Lantern Gold glow buried deep within. Side-view, full body centred, imposing readable silhouette.

'Moss Druid' — a robed antlered druid draped in living moss, a solid upright staff-bearing figure in Moss Sage robes and Guild Amber bark over Slate Ink, a single Lantern Gold mote glowing at the staff-tip. A single solid opaque fully-painted body with one clear continuous silhouette, NOT scattered dots, NOT drifting motes or stipple. Side-view, full body centred, consistent readable silhouette.

'Obsidian Titan' — an immense angular giant carved from volcanic glass, a blocky monolithic silhouette in glossy Slate Ink and Dusk Purple obsidian, glowing Ember Rust and Lantern Gold cracks in its joints. Side-view, full body centred, imposing readable silhouette.

'Shellback' — a squat armored tortoise-beast with a moss-crusted dome shell, a low rounded silhouette in Slate Ink and Moss Sage shell over Guild Amber limbs, ancient and slow with warm Lantern Gold eyes. Side-view, full body centred, consistent readable silhouette.

'Spire Warden' — a tall cliff-carved sentinel like a standing stone given limbs, an angular monolithic silhouette in Slate Ink and Parchment Cream rock with Dusk Purple shadow, a dim Lantern Gold rune-glow. Side-view, full body centred, consistent readable silhouette.

'Stairmaw Hound' — a lean dark hunting hound in a low forward lunge, a sleek four-legged silhouette in Slate Ink and Dusk Purple fur, a wide Ember Rust maw and burning Lantern Gold eyes. Side-view, full body centred, consistent readable silhouette.

'Stoneback Grub' — a fat armored grub with a rocky plated back, a low segmented silhouette in Slate Ink stone and Guild Amber underflesh with Moss Sage lichen patches, tiny Lantern Gold eyes, deceptively slow. Side-view, full body centred, consistent readable silhouette.

'The Drowned King' (boss) — a regal waterlogged monarch on a silt throne, an imposing crowned silhouette in Dusk Purple robes and a tarnished Guild Amber crown over Slate Ink, cold Lantern Gold light in his eyes. Side-view, full body centred, imposing readable silhouette.

'The Hollow Winter' (boss) — a vast amorphous winter-spirit, less a body than a looming blizzard-shape, a swirling silhouette of Parchment Cream frost and Dusk Purple shadow over Slate Ink, a pale Lantern Gold heart-glow. Side-view, full body centred, imposing readable silhouette.

'The Kiln Below' (boss) — an enormous magma-bodied colossus rising from the basin floor, a hulking silhouette of Slate Ink crust split by molten Ember Rust and Lantern Gold veins, radiating searing warmth. Side-view, full body centred, imposing readable silhouette.

'The Last Step' (boss) — a towering ancient armored sentinel at the stair's end, a monumental silhouette in Slate Ink iron and Dusk Purple void, its presence dimming all lantern glow to a faint smothered Lantern Gold. Side-view, full body centred, imposing readable silhouette.

'Thorn Guardian' — a tall bramble-woven warden bristling with thorns, an angular guardian silhouette in Moss Sage and Ember Rust thorned vines over Slate Ink, a faint Lantern Gold glow at its core. Side-view, full body centred, imposing readable silhouette.

'Thornling Swarm' — a roiling cloud of tiny thorn-bodied biters moving as one mass, a shifting swarm silhouette of Moss Sage and Ember Rust specks over Slate Ink, pinprick Lantern Gold eyes scattered throughout. Centred on the flat backdrop, consistent readable swarm shape.

'Tide Husk' — a drifting drowned scholar in current-stirred robes, a floating silhouette in Dusk Purple and Moss Sage waterlogged cloth over Slate Ink, a faint scholarly Lantern Gold glow at its cowl. Side-view, full body centred, consistent readable silhouette.

'Vined Knight' — an armored knight overtaken by living vines, a solid upright sword-bearing figure in dark Slate Ink plate wrapped with Moss Sage vines and Guild Amber bark, a dim Lantern Gold glow behind the visor. A single solid opaque fully-painted body with one clear continuous silhouette, NOT a faint outline, NOT scattered leaves or stipple. Side-view, full body centred, consistent readable silhouette.

'Windborne Hunter' — a lithe winged predator riding the updrafts, a swept-back aerial silhouette in Dusk Purple and Slate Ink feathers edged with Parchment Cream, keen Lantern Gold eyes. Side-view, full body centred, consistent readable silhouette.

class_sprites.prompt: OVERRIDE the single-object framing above: this asset is a 4-FRAME SPRITE SHEET, not one centred object. Render EXACTLY FOUR full-body figures of the SAME cozy-fantasy Warrior hero, evenly spaced left-to-right in a single horizontal row of four equal cells, each figure the SAME outfit, same colours, same scale, same side-on facing and same ground line — differing ONLY by a tiny idle breath (a subtle chest rise and slight weight shift); keep arms, gear and hands in the same position across all four cells. The Warrior: weathered iron pauldrons, a round shield on the left arm, a relaxed sheathed sword, a warm scarf, broad grounded stance, kind tired face. Guild Amber and Slate Ink armour with a Lantern Gold rim light. Clear silhouette readable at small size. Flat uniform backdrop between and around all four figures, no grid lines, no panel borders, no numbers. NOT a single large figure, NOT four different characters.

OVERRIDE the single-object framing above: this asset is a 4-FRAME SPRITE SHEET, not one centred object. Render EXACTLY FOUR full-body figures of the SAME cozy-fantasy Mage hero, evenly spaced left-to-right in a single horizontal row of four equal cells, each figure the SAME outfit, same colours, same scale, same side-on facing and same ground line — differing ONLY by a tiny idle breath (a subtle chest rise and slight weight shift) and a faint staff-light pulse; keep arms, staff and hands in the same position across all four cells. The Mage: a tall arcane focus-staff rising past one shoulder, a bell-flared robe, a curious lantern-lit face. Dusk Purple robes with a faint Lantern Gold spell-glow at the staff finial and Slate Ink shadow. Clear silhouette readable at small size. Flat uniform backdrop between and around all four figures, no grid lines, no panel borders, no numbers. NOT a single large figure, NOT four different characters.

vfx.prompt: A single small abstract light spark for a particle texture: one warm four-point star-burst flare with a bright Lantern Gold #F2B83B hot core fading out through Guild Amber #C8872A to soft feathered edges, radially symmetric and centred. ONLY the glowing light flare itself — absolutely no chest, coin, container, lantern, creature, ground or scenery.

OVERRIDE the 'ONE object only' framing above: this is NOT an object and NOT a lantern — it is a pure abstract light effect for a particle texture. Render a single four-pointed sparkle glint (a soft twinkle / star-shine, like a glint of light catching motes of dust), with a bright warm Parchment Cream #EDE0C4 hot core fading radially outward through pale Moss Sage #7A8C5E to fully transparent feathered edges, perfectly radially symmetric and centred on the flat backdrop. JUST the glowing light glint itself — absolutely NO lantern, NO lamp, NO candle, NO gem or jewel, NO container, NO object of any kind, no creature, no scenery, no frame, no text. NEVER draw a lantern.

A single small abstract glow orb for a particle texture: a warm round soft-bloom with a Lantern Gold #F2B83B hot core fading radially through Guild Amber #C8872A to soft feathered edges, no spikes, centred. ONLY the glow itself — no lantern, no objects, no scenery, no text.

ui.prompt: A warm aged parchment material that completely fills the entire frame edge to edge as one continuous flat sheet — the writing surface of a cozy fantasy guild ledger seen straight on from directly above. Warm Parchment Cream #EDE0C4 base with a subtle, even, fine paper-fibre grain and very gentle warm mottling, calmly and uniformly lit across the WHOLE surface so text laid on top stays perfectly legible (low contrast, no busy detail, no focal point, no vignette, no corner darkening). The parchment fills 100% of the frame as a flat tileable material with straight edges and square corners — NO border line, NO frame, NO rounded corners, NOT torn, NOT ragged, NOT a deckle edge, NOT a floating sheet on a background, NOT folded, NOT curled, NOT a pillow or cushion shape. No objects, no text, no lettering, no drop shadow.
